content.en:
"The next auction items have nothing to do with me!"

Ye Tian said darkly.

After all, he didn't have many Nine Pole Points on him now, and he was not even qualified to bid on even the most ordinary auction items, not to mention that the treasures behind him were getting more and more expensive.

Of course.

He was also very satisfied with the auction and got the items he wanted.

Soon, one by one the auctioned treasures were auctioned, and Ye Tian could only watch the play.

And the price of the treasures in the later auction has reached one million Nine Pole Points, and most of the Nine Extremes Alliance Eternal Dao Realm can't afford to bid at all, and only a few top Eternal Dao Realms are still participating in the auction.

"The next auction item is the Eternal Ancient Diamond, which has a great effect on the impact of the small Eternal Dao Body on the large Eternal Dao Body, and the side effect is that it will deepen the problem of the Eternal Dao Species a little. "

The auctioneer said.

Although the Eternal Ancient Diamond has some problems, for many Eternal Dao Realms, this problem is nothing, if it can make their strength skyrocket, they are naturally willing to refine such treasure resources.

For them, only when they are strong can they hope to get more good things, only then can they get more opportunities, and only then can they hope to surpass the eternal Dao realm in the future.

As for the Eternal Dao Seed, they wouldn't worry about it at all now.

The starting price of the Eternal Diamond is 809,083 pole points, and the transaction price is likely to exceed 2 million 900 pole points.

Really.

After a fierce bidding, at a high price of 2.2 million Nine Pole Points, he was finally auctioned away by a top Eternal Dao Realm.

And the finale item of this auction also shocked Ye Tian.

"The Eternal Primordial Treasure - Fixed Seed Bead, can fix the eternal Dao seed 10 trillion to the Dao era, so that the problem of the eternal Dao seed will not worsen, and it will no longer be able to be fixed after 10 million to the Dao era, but after the auction is successful, after the 10 trillion to the Dao era, it can still be sold without losing money. "

"Of course, during these 100 billion Dao Era years, you must not use a trace of the power of the Eternal Dao Seed, otherwise the Seed Determination Bead will become invalid, and you will not be able to continue to fix your Eternal Dao Seed. "

"Fixed seed beads, the starting price is 10 million nine-pole points!"

As soon as this finale item came out, it made the hearts of those top Eternal Dao Epochs move.

After all, bidding for this treasure is tantamount to investment, and it can continue to be sold in the future, and may even sell even more.

Of course, the premise of wanting to bid is that you have more than 10 million Jiuji points!

Therefore, many Eternal Dao Realms could only watch those top Eternal Dao Realms participate in the auction, but they were not qualified to participate.

"12 million Nine Pole Points!"

"15 million Nine Pole Points!"

"20 million Nine Pole Points!"

These top Eternal Dao realms don't care about these Nine Pole Points at all, and the wealth is terrifying.

In the end, he was auctioned by a top Eternal Dao Realm at a terrifying price of 35 million Nine Pole Points.

In this way, all the auction items were auctioned, and Ye Tian went to pay the nine pole points and took away the items he was bidding for.

......

After coming out of the trading venue, Ye Tian returned to the Guyun Realm and did not stay in the Realm of the Ten Thousand Gods for long.

After coming back.

Ye Tian began to cultivate, he was not in a hurry to go to the Eternal Dao Realm, after his strength was improved, it would not be too late to go to the Eternal Dao Realm!

Anyway, the thing is in his hand, he can use it at any time, there is no need to go now.

"First use resources such as the Eternal Dragon Marrow to improve your cultivation. "

Ye Tian took out a drop of Eternal Dragon Marrow and began to cultivate.

Rumble!!!!!

His cultivation was improving at a speed that was visible to the naked eye.

With drops of Eternal Dragon Marrow plus a variety of precious resources being consumed, Ye Tian's cultivation finally managed to break through to the late stage of the Eternal Dao Realm after millions of Dao Eras.

"Cultivation has finally broken through, and my strength has improved a lot, but it is still a lot away from the peak of the Eternal Dao Realm, I have to take my time, the current resources are definitely not enough!"

Subsequently.

He took out the Ten Thousand Dao Golden Grass and the Nine (CEFB) Leaf Withered Vine to refine and improve his Eternal Dao Body.

These two treasures are indeed extremely precious, and the effect is really good.

As he continued to refine and refine the Eternal Dao Body, his Eternal Dao Body was rapidly improving.

Before you know it, tens of millions of eternal Dao epochs have passed.

And these two treasures were also completely exhausted, and his Eternal Dao Body Transformation had also been raised to the eighty-one realm.

"Things are really good, but unfortunately there are too few!" Ye Tian muttered.

If he found a few more of these treasures, he was sure that he would completely complete the Eternal Dao Body, and at that time, his strength would be terrifyingly enhanced.

But in a short period of time, it was difficult for him to let his strength skyrocket.

"Although the Demon Seed Abyss has some resources to improve the Eternal Dao Body, they are all low-end and will not help me much, maybe it's time to go to the Eternal Dao Realm!"

Ye Tian said darkly.

The Eternal Dao Realm not only has the Eternal State Decree, but also other resources, although there will not be a lot, but if you are lucky, you can still have a big harvest.

Of course.

There is also a danger in the Eternal Dao Realm, he has collected a lot of information about the Eternal Dao Realm in the Nine Extremes Alliance, and he also knows that many Eternal Dao Realms have fallen in the Eternal Dao Realm, and most of them have come out alive, but they have all lost money, and only a few have not lost money.

The reason why I lost money was that I couldn't stay in the Eternal Dao Realm all the time, and if I couldn't find a treasure worth hundreds of thousands of nine pole points at the given time, wouldn't it be a loss!

"One million Eternal Dao Realms, one Eternal Dao Boundary Stone can only allow other Eternal Dao Realms to stay for so long!"

Ye Tian said darkly.

If it exceeds one million Solstice Dao Era, the Eternal Dao Realm Stone will shatter, and the Eternal Dao Realm will continue to expand the problem of the Eternal Dao species, and no one will dare to take the initiative to stay in the Eternal Dao Realm!

If you are forced to stay, the problem of the Eternal Dao Seed expands, and you become a demon seed, then you will lose money!

Therefore, when it comes to the million solstice age years, no matter who it is, they will come out immediately, not daring to stay for one more minute.

"The perfection-level Eternal Dao Seed I have cultivated, maybe I can stay in the Eternal Dao Realm forever!"

Ye Tian guessed.

After he was about to enter the Eternal Dao Realm, he condensed a replica body and tried it.

If that's the case, then he can stay in the Eternal Dao Realm forever.

Immediately, he took out the Eternal Dao Boundary Stone and urged this treasure.

Airplanes!!!!!

The Eternal Dao Boundary Stone emitted a gray light, enveloping Ye Tian.

In an instant, his body left here, and in an instant, he came to the Eternal Dao Realm.

"It's time to reach the Eternal Dao Realm!"

Ye Tian looked around, there was no danger, and he began to condense the second copy body.
